description: Product configuration with attributes, variant generation, exclusion rules, dynamic pricing, visual pickers, custom inputs, and matrix bulk ordering.

actors.name: Product Manager
actors.description: Defines product attributes, values, variants, and pricing rules

actors.name: Variant Engine
actors.description: Generates, manages, and prices product variants

values.name: unconfigured
values.description: Product template has no attributes assigned

values.name: configurable
values.description: Attributes assigned, configurator available for buyers

values.name: fully_generated
values.description: All variant combinations have been created (always mode)

transitions.description: Manager adds attribute lines with multiple values
System generates all variant combinations for always-create attributes

multi_checkbox_requires_no_variant.description: Multi-checkbox display type can only be used with no_variant creation mode, since multiple selections cannot map to a single variant.

variant_mode_immutable_once_used.description: The variant creation mode cannot be changed after attribute lines have been created — doing so would invalidate existing variants.

exclusion_prevents_invalid_combos.description: Excluded combinations are greyed out in the configurator UI and cannot be selected by the buyer.

dynamic_variants_created_on_order.description: For dynamic-mode attributes, the system checks if the selected combination already exists as a variant. If not, it creates one at the time of ordering.

no_variant_extra_price_on_line.description: No-variant attributes add their extra_price directly to the order line total rather than creating a separate product with different list price.

archived_variants_preserved.description: Variants that no longer match active combinations are archived (hidden) rather than deleted, preserving historical order references.

single_value_auto_assigned.description: Attribute lines with only one value are automatically assigned to all variants without requiring buyer selection.

price_updates_in_real_time.description: As the buyer selects attribute values, the displayed price updates immediately to reflect any extra prices from the selection.

given: buyer opens a configurable product in an order
product has attributes with multiple values
product_configured_via_picker.result: Configurator displays attribute lines sorted by sequence, each with its display type (radio, pills, color, etc.), exclusions greyed out, and running price total.

given: buyer selects a combination of attribute values

then.description: Existing variant assigned to the order line

variant_selected_always_mode.result: Pre-existing variant added to order at computed price

given: buyer selects a combination with dynamic-mode attributes
no existing variant matches the selected combination

then.description: New variant created with the selected attribute values
Newly created variant assigned to the order line

variant_created_dynamic_mode.result: New variant generated on-the-fly and added to order

given: buyer selects no_variant attributes (e.g., custom engraving text)

then.description: Attribute values appended to line description
Extra prices from no_variant selections added to line total

no_variant_attributes_applied.result: Attribute selections tracked on order line without creating a new variant

given: buyer opens a product in matrix mode
product has two configurable attribute dimensions
matrix_bulk_order.result: Grid displayed with row/column headers for each attribute value. Buyer enters quantities in each cell. Each non-zero cell creates an order line for that variant combination.

given: attribute value is marked as custom input

then.description: Custom value stored separately linked to the order line

custom_value_entered.result: Custom value appears in order line description for fulfillment

given: buyer selects an attribute value that conflicts with another selection

then.description: Conflicting value greyed out or de-selected

excluded_combination_blocked.result: Invalid combination prevented before order line creation

errors.message: This combination of options is not available.
Variant creation mode cannot be changed after attributes are in use.
Multi-checkbox display requires no-variant creation mode.

events.name: product.configurator.opened
events.description: Configurator UI opened for a product

events.name: product.variant.selected
events.description: Buyer selected an existing variant combination

events.name: product.variant.created
events.description: New variant dynamically created from buyer's selection

events.name: product.matrix.opened
events.description: Matrix ordering grid opened for bulk variant selection

related.reason: Configured products are added as lines on sales orders
Product configurator displayed on website product pages
Product variants selected at POS terminal

goals.description: Product configuration with attributes, variant generation, exclusion rules, dynamic pricing, visual pickers, custom inputs, and matrix bulk ordering.

constraints.description: Data consistency must be maintained across concurrent operations

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: data consistency must be maintained across all operations
